allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user': content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = block.get\('text', ''\) if 'Blaine' in text and \('county' in text.lower\(\) or 'anoka' in text.lower\(\)\) and len\(text\) > 200: print\(f'--- Line {i} ---'\) print\(text[:5000]\) print\(\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and 'Blaine' in content and len\(content\) > 200: print\(f'--- Line {i} ---'\) print\(content[:5000]\) print\(\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user': content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = block.get\('text', ''\) if 'LOCATION PAGE:' in text and len\(text\) > 500: print\(f'=== Line {i} ==='\) print\(text[:8000]\) print\(\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) print\(f'Total lines: {len\(lines\)}'\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg_type = obj.get\('type', ''\) if msg_type == 'user': content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = block.get\('text', ''\) if len\(text\) > 100: print\(f'Line {i}: user text \({len\(text\)} chars\): {text[:100]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 100: print\(f'Line {i}: user content \({len\(content\)} chars\): {content[:100]}'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) obj = json.loads\(lines[123]\) content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = block.get\('text', ''\) print\(text\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(content\) ")
